transcript: Speaker A: 4th interview ittu. HR heludru English weak ide. Modlu English kali illa job sigalla anta heludru. Anna, OTP 4062. [It was my 4th interview. HR said my English is weak and I won't get a job without learning it. Brother, OTP 4062.] Speaker B: Madam, just 1 minute. Madam, this was actually very easy. It's been only 10 days and now I can see my English has become very fluent these days. Thank you. Speaker A: Neevu yaarinda English kalitiddira? [From whom are you learning English?] Speaker B: Madam, SpeakX na AI English teacher inda. Naanu actually kelsa kalkombekaytu, aadre ee teacher save madidru. [Madam, from SpeakX's AI English teacher. I almost lost my job, but this teacher saved me.] Speaker A: Nijana? [Is it true?] Speaker B: Haudu madam. Naanu free irbekadre pratidina hatrinda hadinaidu nimisha practice madtini. Tumba simple aagi English kalsitare. Chik makkalu kuda 15 dinadalli English matadakke kalibodu. Enadru mistake madidre AI teacher takshana sari madutte, judge madalla. [Yes madam. I practice 10-15 minutes daily when free. They teach simply; even kids can learn in 15 days. The AI corrects mistakes instantly without judgment.] Speaker A: Hauda? Kaliyoke eshtu duddu agutte? [Really? How much does it cost?] Speaker B: Madam, just eradu roopayige elu dina trial ide. [Madam, there is a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees.] Speaker A: Hauda? Ashtena anna? Thank you. Nan phone allu ee app download madkodi please. [Really? That's all? Thank you. Please download this app on my phone too.]
on_screen_text: 4th interview ittu [4th interview], HR heludru [HR said], modlu English kali illa [learn English first], job sigalla anta heludru [otherwise no job], OTP 4062, Madam just 1 minute, Madam this was actually very easy, it's been only 10 days, I can see my English has become very fluent these days, Thank you, neevu yaarinda English kalitiddira? [from whom are you learning English?], SpeakX, AI English teacher inda [from AI English teacher], nanu actually kelsa kalkombekaytu [I almost lost my job], adre ee teacher save madidru [but this teacher saved me], Nijana? [Really?], haudu madam [yes madam], nanu free irbekadre pratidina hatrinda hadinaidu nimisha practice madtini [I practice 10-15 mins daily when free], Tumba simple aagi English kalsitare [They teach English very simply], chik makkalu kuda 15 dinadalli English matadakke kalibodu [even kids can learn to speak in 15 days], Enadre mistake madidre AI teacher takshana sari madutte judge madalla [AI corrects mistakes instantly without judging], Houda esht dud agutte? [Really, how much does it cost?], Madam just eradu roopayige elu dina trial ide [Just 2 rupees for a 7-day trial], Houda ashtena anna thank you [Really, that's all? Thank you], nan phone allu app download madkodi please [please download the app on my phone too], SpeakX App, Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: A woman shares her distress over failing job interviews due to poor English. A delivery driver demonstrates how he improved his English fluency in 10 days using the SpeakX AI app. He encourages her to download the app, highlighting its low-cost 7-day trial.
